name: Shallaki (Boswellia)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Pitta.
mainMedicinalUses: Invaluable for osteoarthritis and chronic inflammatory diseases.
Reduces joint swelling and improves range of motion.
Used for inflammatory bowel diseases like Colitis.
safetyProfile: Generally safe; may cause mild stomach upset in some.
